replies.msg:
官網 : http://lifeisfeudal.com/mmo?l=features
Discord : https://discord.gg/dFJ56xK
TG Group : https://t.me/joinchat/Cwelugq6NvxQltE4U3Cy5g

Life is Feudal係一隻中世紀做背景，主要係生活型既MMO，由玩家營運世界既一款遊戲，入面國與國之間既外交，交易，內政等等都係由玩家一腳踢
您可以同其他玩家組成一條小村莊，慢慢將佢發展成一個城邦，甚至係一個國家。
但係呢段時間唔好以為無乜野做，其實呢隻game十分detail。
由整把劍講起，首先係劍身你要搵石匠幫手整個劍模先，再比鐵匠去鑄劍身，但係鐵你又要搵礦工幫你挖，
之後再搵木匠整劍柄，然後將兩樣野合埋先做到把劍。
到左後期你可以帶兵去攻人地城搶資源。

同埋隻Game係有繁體中文架, 唔洗驚唔識字!

最低配置
OS (64-bit): Windows 7 (SP1), Windows 8.1, Windows 10
Processor (AMD): Phenom II X4 with at least 2,5 GHz
Processor (Intel): Core i5 with at least 2,5 GHz
Memory: 4GB RAM
Graphics card (AMD): Radeon™ HD 5850
Graphics card (NVIDIA): GeForce® GTX 460
DirectX: 11.0
Online Connection Requirements: 2048 KBPS or faster
Broadband Internet connection
Hard-drive space: 20GB

steam唔係有隻差唔多名？

steam果隻係單機版叫做Life is Feudal: Your Own
MMO版就係Life is Feudal: MMO
分別在於世界既大細同埋server hosting
MMO版容納到1萬個玩家, 而Your Own就好似MC咁自己開ser入去玩, 其他人都可以入黎起自己既城然後互片

你可以揀唔練生產系既，不過搵資源同做運輸你走唔甩
無礦工就無打鐵佬，無打鐵佬就無武器
咁係咪一定要同其他玩家互動？
定係可以搵打鐵佬npc整把劍，之後就打天下
如果我跟左你地公會，四圍殺人搶野，會唔會踢我
因為一玩依d就好想做山賊，但見你地好似好和平咁
裝備一定要搵人整，呢個世界無npc
山賊流既可以入台仔公會
巴哈有post

但呢個世界會有警察

大陸又係好多人玩
直情係用生命在遊戲
岀去挖下石仔路程都要一，兩個鐘
打擊感好差喎 風格似騎砍
兩個player撞埋一齊會炒粉卡畫面
即係戰鬥上仲係好差
不過建築上好自由

Problem: Acquiring skills is very slow.
Solution: Exp-boosters in Cash-shop!

Problem:: The skill-cap is restricting my gameplay and making us not competitive in a PVP surrounding.
Solution: Buy more characters!

Problem: The start is wasting hours of my lifetime.
Solution: Equipment in cash-shop!

Problem: I lose a lot of skill-points when I die.
Solution: Skill-loss-protection in cash-shop!

Problem: I lose more skill-points on death when I kill a lot of players because my alignment is low.
Solution: More expensive Skill-loss-protection in cash-shop!

Problem: Life is Feudal: Your Own backers during Early Access were promised "Beta-access" but we dont have the server capacities for all of them yet.
Solution: Oh boy! We have an artifically created short supply here!
Let them pay 60$ for beta-access instead of giving out a limited amount of free beta-keys like every normal developer!

Problem: I want to delete my character and make a new one!
Solution: Pay 10$!
